SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-05-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIRECT MAIL CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT A LA CARTE PUBLISHING, LLC $1,976.55 PRINCIPAL, $250.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,226.55, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
